title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
